stories.title: Socratic interview must use AskUserQuestion (not flat prose) across all 3 planos command skills
acceptanceCriteria: planos-plan.md, planos-prd.md, planos-review.md each mandate AskUserQuestion for every interview question (opening, follow-ups, final confirmation) — VERIFIED
Self-containment held: zero matches for /deep-interview, /grill-me, /oh-my-claudecode:, /omc: in plugin/commands/*.md — VERIFIED
All test-asserted phrases preserved; 32/32 test files pass, 0 failures — VERIFIED
Regression guard added: each command test asserts src.includes('AskUserQuestion') — VERIFIED PASS x3
Independent code-reviewer pass: APPROVED, 0 critical/high — VERIFIED

stories.title: Browser showed raw minified JS / 'plan failed with error' (Problems 2 & 3)
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: inline doc spliced inside the JS module bundle, corrupting single-file HTML — already fixed at HEAD by commit 49d18f8 + tests/spa-inline-injection.test.mjs

Independent production-path smoke (real buildSpaHtml): HTML well-formed, window.__PLANOS_DOC__ injected before real </head> and outside the bundle, </script> breakout neutralized, doc round-trips — VERIFIED
Session 0296a938 analysis confirmed Problem 2 == Problem 3 (same root cause), not a separate error
